prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京理工大学在上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约3504名→4103名→4096名→3676名→4096名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2022年位次后移约600名，2023年基本持平，2024年回升至3676名，2025年又回落至4096名，近5年波动区间约3500–4100名，2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海综合类招生计划2021年23人，2022–2024年均为32人，2025年增至34人；2026年计划招生38人，较2025年增加4人，扩招约11.8%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定稀释作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第14名（2025年第13名），稳居全国顶尖理工类高校前列，办学层次和综合实力突出；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风及学校管理类舆情事件，但学校舆情应对较为高效；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），短视频平台曝光量处于中上水平，反映考生关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程获评A+，光学工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术获评A，力学、化学工程与技术、工商管理、数学、物理学获评A-，A-及以上学科共12个，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2026年高考周期内持续高热推荐，与北理工优势学科高度契合，吸引大量高分考生报考；上海2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.3%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；省控线数据2026年缺失，；北京理工大学位于北京市，属京校异地招生，在上海招生计划近年持续增加（23→32→34→38），本地招生占比有所提升，但上海考生对京校的报考热度总体稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4096名、2026年扩招约11.8%（稀释竞争）、上海考生总数大幅增长约35.3%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、抖音热度较热及专业热度高（吸引高分考生）等多重因素，扩招的稀释效应不足以抵消考生总数大幅增长带来的竞争加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（更难进）。预测最低录取位次约4285名，波动区间3797–4773名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来精工技术）
- 工科试验班（徐特立英才班）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（卓越班）
- 工科试验班（电子信息实验班）
- 工科试验班（信息科学技术方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（理学与材料菁英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4285名，区间3797–4773名。位次在区间中上段（约4000名以内）可重点冲刺一档未来精工技术或徐特立英才班；位次在区间中段（约4000–4500名）以二档卓越班、电子信息实验班为主力选择；位次在区间下段（约4500名以后）建议以三档理科试验班保底，同时关注二档专业是否有扩招带来的机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Institute of Technology in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 3504 → 4103 → 4096 → 3676 → 4096, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved back by about 600 places, remained basically flat in 2023, rebounded to 3676 in 2024, and fell back to 4096 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 3500–4100, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 4096. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai's comprehensive category was 23 in 2021, 32 from 2022 to 2024, and increased to 34 in 2025. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 38, an increase of 4 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 11.8%, which is relatively large and has a certain dilution effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 14th (13th in 2025), firmly among the top-tier prestigious science and engineering universities in China, with outstanding institutional level and comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving public opinion incidents related to teacher ethics and school management, but the school's response to public opinion has been relatively efficient. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high attention from candidates. No obvious record of enrollment gaps was observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering, and Control Science and Engineering were rated A+, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology were rated A, and Mechanics, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Business Administration, Mathematics, and Physics were rated A-. There are a total of 12 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, highly aligned with BIT's advantageous disciplines, attracting a large number of high-scoring candidates to apply. The total number of candidates in Shanghai for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.3% compared to 49,276 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, recruiting students from other provinces. Its enrollment plan in Shanghai has been increasing in recent years (23→32→34→38), with an increased proportion of local enrollment, but the popularity of Beijing-based universities among Shanghai candidates remains generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 4096, an enrollment expansion of about 11.8% in 2026 (diluting competition), a significant increase of about 35.3% in the total number of Shanghai candidates (intensifying competition), a slightly negative school reputation (mildly suppressing), relatively hot Douyin popularity and high major popularity (attracting high-scoring candidates), the dilution effect of the expansion is insufficient to offset the intensified competition caused by the significant increase in candidate numbers. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher (more difficult to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 4285, with a fluctuation range of 3797–4773.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top-Notch Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 4285, with a range of 3797–4773. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (approximately within 4000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Future Precision Engineering Technology or Xu Teli Talent Class; those with rankings in the middle part of the range (approximately 4000–4500) should consider Tier 2 Excellence Class or Electronic Information Experimental Class as main choices; those with rankings in the lower part of the range (approximately after 4500) are advised to use Tier 3 Science Experimental Class as a safety option, while also paying attention to opportunities brought by expansion in Tier 2 majors.
